title: Essense Heels Show
company: Essense founder Pearl Makayi, who also takes to the stage throughout the evening, this showcase marks her first full-length production. Pearl’s artistry is a vital part of the Brighton dance scene, known for its confidence, sensuality, and emotional presence.
description: Director/Choreographer - Pearl MakayiDancers:Claudia LouisEloisa EnfieldLily McGibbonLydia GraceMaisie ParisMimi EdgePearl MakayiRachel ThulbornHarriet Purser Venues:The Dance Space - The Jamie Watton Creation Space The Dance Space - The Jamie Watton Creation Space
